aboutGame.title: What is Anime Vanguards?
paragraphs: Anime Vanguards is a Roblox anime tower defense game where players summon units, place them across stages, and build teams around traits, evolutions, and game-mode-specific synergies.
It blends accessible early progression with a high-ceiling endgame focused on banner management, resource farming, challenge clears, and update-driven meta shifts.

explore.title: Anime Vanguards Homepage Modules Navigation
explore.description: Jump straight to the eight Anime Vanguards guide sections and open the module you need.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Codes
modules.description: Find the latest Anime Vanguards codes for free Trait Rerolls, Memoria Shards, Iced Teas, and other valuable rewards. Check each code's reward and status before visiting the complete redemption guide.

highlights.detail: Redeem for 50 Trait Rerolls and 5,000 Iced Teas.

highlights.label: EternalAdversaries
highlights.detail: Redeem for 50 Memoria Shards and 5,000 Iced Teas.

highlights.label: Gambler
highlights.detail: Redeem for 50 Trait Rerolls, 50 Memoria Shards, and 5 Rainbow Essence Stones.

highlights.label: Cog5th
highlights.detail: This code is no longer available for redemption.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Tier List
modules.description: Compare the best Anime Vanguards units and identify which characters are worth summoning, evolving, and upgrading. The rankings provide a quick overview of top-tier, reliable, situational, and low-priority units.

highlights.label: S
highlights.detail: Demon Leader (Control), God (Above Heaven), Song Jinwu and Igros, Gujo (Infinity), Lich King (Ruler), Rogita (Super 4), Ice Queen (Release), and Alocard (Vampire King).

highlights.label: A
highlights.detail: Deceiver (Monster), Horsegirls (Racers), Igros (Elite Knight), Astolfo (Rider of Black), Ice Manipulator (Admiral), Company Captain (Hybrid), Armored Mage (Requip), Elastic Captain (Pirate), Fastest Shinobi (Flash), Delusional Demon (Blood), Saber (Black Tyrant), and Slime (King).

highlights.label: B
highlights.detail: Warlord (Of the Sea) and Fallen Angel (Pistols).

highlights.label: C
highlights.detail: Manipulator (Spider), with Gazelle (Zombie) and Leo (Fangs) placed below this tier in the referenced rankings.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Beginner Guide
modules.description: Follow a practical progression path for starting Anime Vanguards, earning gems, summoning units, and unlocking important upgrade systems. These steps help new players avoid wasting early resources.

highlights.detail: Redeem active codes from the Profile and Codes menu to collect free rerolls, shards, and upgrade materials.
Choose your starter unit and visit the Summon Portal in the hub to expand your team. Standard summons cost 50 Gems each.
Complete Story stages to unlock more content and earn approximately 80 to 240 Gems per stage.
Use Mandra for Trait Rerolls and Cyan for stat rerolls when you begin improving your strongest units.
Move into Infinite Mode, raids, quests, and boss bounties after establishing a reliable Story Mode team.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Traits Guide
modules.description: Learn how Anime Vanguards traits improve unit damage, attack speed, range, and overall performance. Compare rare traits and understand which bonuses are worth keeping before spending more Trait Rerolls.

highlights.label: Monarch
highlights.detail: Has a 0.1% reroll chance and grants 300% Damage, 10% lower SPA, and 5% additional Range, but limits the unit to one placement.

highlights.label: Ethereal
highlights.detail: Has a 0.175% reroll chance and grants 20% Damage, 20% lower SPA, and 5% additional Range.

highlights.label: Deadeye
highlights.detail: Has a 0.375% reroll chance and grants 45% Critical Chance and 50% Critical Damage.

highlights.label: Trait Rerolls
highlights.detail: Traits can be rerolled through Mandra near the Evolve area using Trait Reroll items earned from codes, quests, challenges, and progression rewards.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Units Guide
modules.description: Discover how to obtain Anime Vanguards units through starter selections, summons, stage drops, and special banners. The guide also highlights rare characters that require significant farming or summon luck.

highlights.label: Starter Units
highlights.detail: New players begin by choosing between Ichiga, Roku, and Luffo before building a larger team.

highlights.label: Summon Portal
highlights.detail: Standard banner summons cost 50 Gems each and are the main method for obtaining additional units.

highlights.label: Igros
highlights.detail: Igros can drop from Act 3 of Dungeon Disaster with a reported drop chance of 0.75%.

highlights.label: Alocard
highlights.detail: Alocard is a Secret summon unit associated with an extremely low reported summon chance of 0.004%.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Gems Guide
modules.description: Learn the most useful ways to earn Gems for summons and account progression. Compare repeatable activities, daily rewards, and stage-based farming methods before deciding where to spend your playtime.

highlights.label: Story Stages
highlights.detail: Story progression can award approximately 80 to 240 Gems per completed stage.

highlights.label: Infinite Mode
highlights.detail: Infinite Mode can generate approximately 1,700 to 2,100 Gems per hour depending on progression speed and team strength.

highlights.label: Boss Bounties
highlights.detail: Boss bounties can award 500 Gems per completion for up to ten daily completions, totaling as much as 5,000 Gems.

highlights.label: Worldlines
highlights.detail: Worldlines award 250 Gems for each of the first 50 floors and 150 Gems for each subsequent floor.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Evolution Guide
modules.description: Review the materials, currencies, and takedown requirements needed to evolve popular Anime Vanguards units. Evolution can unlock stronger forms, improved abilities, and significantly better late-game performance.

highlights.label: Gujo Infinity
highlights.detail: Evolving Gujo into Gujo (Infinity) requires the necessary evolution materials and 15,000 Gold.

highlights.label: Igros Elite Knight
highlights.detail: Requires 30,000 Gold, 32 Green Essence Stones, 10 Red Essence Stones, 12 Blood-Red Armor, 10 Blue Essence Stones, 10 Pink Essence Stones, and 1 Rainbow Essence Stone.

highlights.label: Alocard Vampire King
highlights.detail: Requires 30,000 Gold, 1 Hellsing Arms, 35 Green Essence Stones, 13 Yellow Essence Stones, 13 Purple Essence Stones, 13 Red Essence Stones, and 2 Rainbow Essence Stones.

highlights.label: Tuji Sorcerer Killer
highlights.detail: Requires 5,000 takedowns, 30,000 Gold, 1 Cursed Worm, 40 Green Essence Stones, 15 Blue Essence Stones, 15 Purple Essence Stones, 15 Red Essence Stones, and 4 Rainbow Essence Stones.

modules.name: Anime Vanguards Updates
modules.description: Follow major Anime Vanguards updates, trailers, new units, game modes, and progression systems. This section provides a clear path to detailed update coverage based on official announcements and videos.

highlights.label: Godly Ascension
highlights.detail: Update 13.0 introduced six new units, a new Story, a new Rift and Rift unit, a new Battlepass, the Pirate Dynasty game mode, and six new Memorias.

highlights.label: Gear 5th
highlights.detail: The official Anime Vanguards account announced Gear 5th alongside the Godly Ascension trailer and update rollout.

highlights.label: Eternal Adversaries
highlights.detail: Eternal Adversaries received a dedicated trailer published by the official Anime Vanguards YouTube channel.

highlights.label: Core Gameplay
highlights.detail: The official Roblox page describes a gameplay loop centered on summoning units, leveling and evolving them, and completing multiple game modes with friends.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about Anime Vanguards.

items.question: What is Anime Vanguards?
items.answer: Anime Vanguards is a Roblox anime tower defense game where players summon units, place them on stages, upgrade teams, and clear modes built around traits, evolutions, and resource farming.

items.question: What should beginners do first in Anime Vanguards?
items.answer: Anime Vanguards beginners should redeem active codes, clear early Story stages, save Gems for useful banners, and focus upgrades on a small team before pushing harder modes.

items.question: Where can I find Anime Vanguards codes?
items.answer: Anime Vanguards codes are tracked on the Codes page with reward details, status notes, and redemption steps so players can check rerolls, shards, Iced Teas, and other rewards quickly.

items.question: Which Anime Vanguards units should I build?
items.answer: Anime Vanguards players should compare the tier list, current banners, evolutions, and available materials before investing heavily in a unit, especially during update-driven meta changes.

items.question: How do traits and evolutions work in Anime Vanguards?
items.answer: Anime Vanguards traits add powerful unit bonuses through rerolls, while evolutions use materials, Gold, and progression requirements to unlock stronger unit forms for later content.

finalCta.title: Ready to Master Anime Vanguards?
finalCta.description: From your first Roblox summons to trait optimization and endgame clears, this fan wiki keeps the next smart step close at hand.
